summary: Comprehensive testing of TrustLens new features (iteration 16) - Conversation Coach PDF Export and Enhanced My Analyses Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns active status
Backend: POST /api/analysis/start?analysis_type=deep returns session_id
Backend: POST /api/analysis/baseline accepts required fields
Backend: POST /api/analysis/changes accepts categories
Backend: POST /api/analysis/timeline accepts timeline data
Backend: GET /api/analysis/{session_id}/question returns questions
Backend: POST /api/analysis/answer processes answers
Backend: GET /api/analysis/{session_id}/results returns full results with suspicion_score, signals, pattern_statistics
Backend: POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach returns structured guidance
Backend: NEW - POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach/pdf returns valid PDF (content-type: application/pdf, starts with %PDF header)
Backend: POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach/pdf returns 404 for invalid session
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns token for valid credentials (syscheck@test.com)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user
Backend: GET /api/auth/my-analyses requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Backend: NEW - GET /api/auth/my-analyses returns analyses with suspicion_score, suspicion_label, dominant_pattern, top_signals
Backend: POST /api/auth/link-analysis links session to user
Backend: POST /api/reports/share creates shared report
Backend: GET /api/reports/{report_id} returns shared report
Backend: GET /api/reports/{report_id}/pdf returns valid PDF
Backend: POST /api/mirror/create returns mirror_id
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero headline 'Is my partner cheating?'
Frontend: Pink CTA button 'Start Relationship Analysis' visible (#ff2e8b)
Frontend: CTA click navigates to /clarity
Frontend: ConversationCoach page loads with tone/topic selection
Frontend: Tone buttons (gentle, direct, curious, supportive) clickable
Frontend: Topic buttons (recent_changes, feelings, communication, future, trust) clickable
Frontend: Get Conversation Guide button present
Frontend: MyAnalyses page redirects to home without auth (correct behavior)
Frontend: MyAnalyses page loads with auth token
Frontend: MyAnalyses shows Analysis History list with cards
Frontend: MyAnalyses detail panel shows score bar (21/100 in teal for low signal)
Frontend: MyAnalyses detail panel shows Dominant Pattern (Emotional Distance)
Frontend: MyAnalyses detail panel shows Changes Detected badges
Frontend: MyAnalyses detail panel shows Top Signals Detected with progress bars
Frontend: MyAnalyses has View Full Results button
Frontend: Mobile responsive - hamburger menu present
Frontend: Mobile responsive - hero section displays correctly
Frontend: Mobile responsive - Why TrustLens cards stack vertically
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 1259-1352: POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach/pdf properly generates PDF using reportlab with styled sections
server.py line 1829-1876: GET /api/auth/my-analyses returns enhanced data (suspicion_score, suspicion_label, dominant_pattern, top_signals)
ConversationCoach.jsx: handleDownloadPdf function properly fetches PDF blob and triggers download
ConversationCoach.jsx: Download PDF button (data-testid='download-coach-pdf-btn') present in guidance view
MyAnalyses.jsx: Complete rewrite with ScoreBar component, signal comparison bars, and detail panel
MyAnalyses.jsx: Analysis cards show date, score, label, and analysis type
MyAnalyses.jsx: Detail panel includes score header, dominant pattern, changes detected, top signals section
All data-testid attributes properly placed on interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users during pytest for registration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features fully tested: (1) POST /api/analysis/conversation-coach/pdf endpoint generates valid PDF with coaching guidance, (2) GET /api/auth/my-analyses returns enhanced data including suspicion_score, suspicion_label, dominant_pattern, and top_signals array, (3) Frontend ConversationCoach page has Download PDF button (shows after getting guidance), (4) Frontend MyAnalyses page completely rewritten with detail panel showing score bar, signals, dominant pattern. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_v2.py (17 tests). Auth test user: syscheck@test.com / test1234

frontend_features: Analysis History list with clickable cards
Detail panel with score bar (color-coded: teal <40, orange 40-70, red >70)
Top Signals with animated progress bars
Score comparison with previous analysis (TrendingUp/TrendingDown icons)
